reasoning: The evaluation found a total of 5 major defects. The LLM noted a missing digital signature block with important metadata. Additionally, programmatic detectors found four major structural issues: retained page numbers, retained headers/footers, incorrect list marker types, and a truncated image alt text. Because there are exactly 5 major issues, the document meets the threshold for HUMAN_REVIEW.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: On Page 1 of the source PDF, there is a digital signature block next to the author's name ('Larry Frost'). This block contains important metadata, including the signer's email address and timestamp. This text is completely missing from the output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote:
Digitally signed by LYF
DN: cn=LYF, o=DWM, ou=SWS, email=larry.frost@ncdenr.gov, c=US
Date: 2016.05.12 12:11:52 -04'00'
concerns.location: Page 1, 'From:' section next to Larry Frost's name

concerns.description: Page number artifacts retained: Page 3 of 5, Page 5 of 5

Header/footer elements retained in output (5): State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Waste Mana; Meeting Officer’s Report Coal Ash Impoundment Classification; Meeting Officer’s Report
Coal Ash Impoundment Classification
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=5, pages_affected=5/5. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.

concerns.description: Lists converted incorrectly: 2 ordered list(s) rendered as alphabetical (A, B, C) but contain roman numeral markers (I, II, III) — e.g. "II. March 22, 2016 Public Meeting and Oral Comments Summary"; "II. Public Meeting Sign-in Forms"
concerns.analysis: roman_letter_confusion=2. The renderer misclassified roman numeral lists as alphabetical starting at letter 'I'. Item text retains original roman numerals alongside incorrect letter markers, breaking list semantics.

concerns.description: Incomplete image alt text: 1 image(s) with inadequate descriptions (1 truncated mid-sentence) — e.g. p1: "...aturing large black letters "NC" with a white pine"
concerns.analysis: incomplete_alt_text=1 (truncated=1, placeholder=0, empty=0). Per WCAG 2.1 AA, meaningful images must have descriptive alternative text for screen-reader accessibility.

action_items: Restore the missing digital signature block metadata.
Strip header and footer elements from the main document flow.
Correct the ordered list marker types from alphabetical to roman numerals.
Complete the truncated image alt text.
